name: Multi-Cloud & FinOps Management
description: Zentralisierte Multi-Cloud-Governance über Multi Cloud Connectivity Platform und Future Cloud Infrastructure, mit strukturiertem FinOps-Maturity-Assessment, kontinuierlichem Cost Management und eingebetteten Compliance-Controls für BSI C5, GDPR und lokale Regulierung.

issues.detail: Portfolio language is 'en' but description is written in German.
Multi-Cloud Connectivity Platform and governance topics overlap significantly with hybrid-cloud feature. Boundaries between these two features are unclear.
Mentions cost management and compliance but does not quantify the value proposition — e.g., typical savings percentages, time-to-compliance.
Missing fields: product, created, status, differentiators, use_cases.
